text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper is real, published in *Nature Computational Science* (2024), but the cited authors ("Chia-Yu et al. Chang") are completely fabricated. The actual authors are Raphael Schäfer, Till Nicke, Henning Höfener, Annkristin Lange, Dorit Merhof, Friedrich Feuerhake, Volkmar Schulz, Johannes Lotz, and Fabian Kiessling — none of whom match the cited author name.
LINK: https://www.nature.com/articles/s43588-024-00662-z
